concerns.text: The idea explicitly states that a null result (e.g., r < 0.2) is publishable, but the specification’s Success Criteria (SC-001‑SC-004) require meeting strict thresholds (r ≥ 0.4, MAE ≤ 0.05, p < 0.05) for the project to be considered successful, effectively redefining the research question to only accept a positive outcome.

The idea’s methodology sketch specifies an 80/20 train‑validation split, yet the specification never states the split ratio (only mentions a validation set). This omission leaves a required data‑partitioning detail undefined.
